basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) has officially announced the Project Research Scientist I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a first-class Master's degree in Physiology, Life Sciences, Neuroscience, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, or a related discipline from a recognized university are eligible to participate. Interested candidates can attend the walkin interview on 16 July 2026. The official notification and walk-in details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation to SC/ ST/ OBC as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st class Master's degree in Physiology/ Life Sciences/Neuroscience/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology or related discipline from a recognized university
qualification.details: 1st class Master's degree in Physiology/ Life Sciences/ Neuroscience/ Biotechnology/ Molecular Biology or related discipline from a recognized university.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist I Job 2026 Notification PDF

AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist I Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Project Research Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 16th July 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: A 1st class Master's degree in Physiology, Life Sciences, Neuroscience, Biotechnology, Molecular Biology, or a related discipline from a recognized university is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post at AIIMS Raebareli.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli, Uttar Pradesh, 229405.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual position?
faq.answer: Yes, the position of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) is on a contractual basis.
